photos.title: Sunset Coucher de soleil - Cap Ferret Bassin d'Arcachon Ocean Pecheur Fisherman Beach Plage Waves Vagues Water Eau Boat Bateau Oiseau Birds bleu orange Claouey Aquitaine Gironde Bordeaux Voile - Picture Image Photography.jpg
photos.description:
Cap Ferret is a French cap forming a barrier beach that lies at the southern end of the peninsula of Lege -Cap- Ferret , Gironde . It separates the Atlantic Ocean and the Bay of Arcachon . Famous for its lighthouse is located in the heart of the Landes de Gascogne and the Pays de Buch.
Places that are found from north to south : Claouey , The Jacquets , Petit and Grand Piquey Piraillan , Canon , L'Herbe , La Vigne and Cap -Ferret .
The peninsula of Cap Ferret is only 3,000 years of geological hi
photos.author: www.twin-loc.fr
